question: What does it mean for Python to be an "interpreted language" as stated in the text?
options: It requires manual translation before execution.
Its code is executed directly without prior compilation into machine code.
It only runs on specific proprietary hardware.
It compiles into an executable binary file before running.
correctAnswer: Its code is executed directly without prior compilation into machine code.
